overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit downtown district. The player character walks past corporate buildings including Fuyutsuki and Kendachi, crosses intersections, and navigates through a futuristic urban environment with heavy atmospheric effects and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with corporate headquarters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked sidewalk past illuminated corporate buildings

notable_agents.action: person holding a black umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall corporate building with large red neon signage and glass facade
multi-lane road with reflective wet surface showing neon reflections
short black and yellow posts lining the sidewalk edge
tropical palm trees in front of the Fuyutsuki building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked downtown sidewalk at night, dominated by the illuminated Fuyutsuki corporate building on the left. The player walks forward along the concrete path, passing yellow-and-black bollards while palm trees sway gently beside the structure. The wet asphalt street reflects the cyan and magenta neon lights, and a pedestrian with an umbrella approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked intersection with elevated transit line

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk to cross the wet street
turning right at the intersection to follow the new street direction

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet intersection and turning right onto a new street beneath an elevated transit line

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign spanning across the street overhead
elevated train track structure with glowing cyan lights running above the street
transparent safety barrier along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the rain-slicked intersection, leaving the Fuyutsuki building behind, and turns right onto a new street. An elevated transit track with glowing cyan accents runs overhead, supporting a large Kendachi corporate sign. A black sports car drives past on the wet asphalt as the player moves beneath the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated transit

events.description: approaching large illuminated intersection with massive holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the elevated transit line toward a major commercial intersection with increasing neon illumination

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building covered in large holographic advertisements and video screens
large digital display showing concert advertisements with purple and white graphics

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the shelter of the elevated transit line, the player approaches a major intersection dominated by a massive building covered in holographic advertisements. The Kendachi sign remains visible overhead while the Samurai concert billboard grows larger in the center view. The wet sidewalk reflects the increasing density of neon lights from surrounding structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with holographic advertising tower

events.description: turning left at the intersection to proceed down the new street
entering narrower street with distinctive twisted glass skyscraper

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing past pedestrians with umbrellas while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: person with red hair and black umbrella crossing the street
person in white clothing standing at the street corner

entered.detail: uniquely shaped modern glass tower with twisted architecture and green interior lighting
palm trees lining the right side of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: At the major intersection, the player turns left, leaving the Kendachi sign and massive digital building behind. A person with red hair and an umbrella crosses in front, while another stands at the corner. The view opens toward a distinctive twisted glass skyscraper glowing with green light, and the player continues down the new street lined with palm trees and reflective wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked downtown district that shifts from the shadow of one corporate monolith to the glow of an elevated transit hub. It begins on a wet sidewalk dominated by the illuminated Fuyutsuki building, moving past swaying palm trees and yellow-and-black bollards while cyan and magenta neon lights reflect off the asphalt. As the camera advances, it passes a pedestrian with an umbrella and crosses a shimmering intersection, leaving the Fuyutsuki structure behind. The scene then shifts as the player turns right, moving beneath a massive overpass where a black sports car streaks past on the damp road. Finally, the view opens up under an elevated transit track accented with glowing cyan lights and a prominent Kendachi corporate sign.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving from the sheltered shadows of an elevated transit line into the open, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic city intersection. It begins by advancing beneath the transit tracks toward a massive building draped in holographic advertisements, where the glow of a Samurai concert billboard grows dominant against the rain-slicked sidewalk. As the camera reaches the major crossing, the view shifts left, leaving the Kendachi signage behind while passing a red-haired pedestrian with an umbrella. The scene then opens up to reveal a distinctive twisted glass skyscraper radiating green light, before the camera continues down a new street lined with palm trees and reflective wet pavement.
